user.title: Cork Dork
user.description: Set up Cork Dork. This will create a wine inventory with default cabinet sections. You can customize the layout after setup.

init.title: Cork Dork Options
init.description: To sync your Vivino cellar, paste your cellar page URL and your Vivino session cookie (see the docs: docs/vivino-import.md). The cookie is verified against your cellar when you save.

data.default_wine_type: Default wine type for new entries
data.gemini_api_key: Google Gemini API key (for AI label recognition)
data.vivino_session_cookie: Vivino session cookie (from your logged-in browser)
data.vivino_auto_sync: Automatically sync the Vivino cellar twice a day

error.vivino_invalid_auth: Vivino rejected the session cookie — it may be expired or wrong. Paste a fresh one from your logged-in browser.
error.vivino_cannot_connect: Could not reach Vivino — check your network connection and try again.
error.vivino_incomplete: Enter both the cellar URL and the session cookie, or leave both empty to disable the connection.
